positive: A mystical cosmic guardian creature, stylized as a symmetrical phoenix combining geometric Art Nouveau elements with celestial nebula patterns. The design should feature clean, thick linework, resembling a detailed vintage woodcut etching mixed with modern psychedelic mandalas. The creature is rendered in a centralized, powerful silhouette against a dark, starry void background. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep midnight blue, ethereal purple, and glowing metallic gold accents. Emphasize highly intricate details, strong black lines, and a vector-art aesthetic suitable for screen printing on apparel. The overall composition must be balanced and decorative.
negative: photorealism, low detail, noisy, blur, text, signature, watermark, artifacts, dirty, grunge, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, logo, trademark, celebrity, copyrighted character
